name: Carbink

forms.name: Amethyst-Crystal
forms.pokedexDescription: This form of Carbink is born during the formation of underground geodes. When light refracts through its amethyst crystals, its psychic powers awaken.

forms.name: Echo-Shard-Crystal
forms.pokedexDescription: This form of Carbink is only found in the deepest darkest depths of the caves. It is unknown how it came into being... Its body reverberates with sound, said to be echoes of the past.

evolutions.summary: Nivel · Amistad 160+ · De noche · variante echo

forms.name: Emerald-Crystal
forms.pokedexDescription: This form of Carbink is born from the high pressure when mountains form. Its emerald-green glow makes it a favorite of the Villagers.

forms.name: Quartz-Crystal
forms.pokedexDescription: This form of Carbink is born from sediment that was compressed and heated from the Nether's volcanic activity. Its crystals have a glass-like structure, making them very sharp.

forms.name: royal
forms.pokedexDescription: It has slept underground for hundreds of millions of years since its birth. It's occasionally found during the excavation of caves.

pokedexDescription: It has slept underground for hundreds of millions of years since its birth. It's occasionally found during the excavation of caves.
